samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_16bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Chip clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for chip reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="start">Chip enable signal to initiate the multiplication operation.</input>
        <input id="ain" width_description="[15:0]">Input signal representing the multiplicand (a).</input>
        <input id="bin" width_description="[15:0]">Input signal representing the multiplier (b).</input>
        <output id="yout" width_description="[31:0]">Product output signal.</output>
        <output id="done">Chip output flag signal. Defined as 1 indicates the completion of the multiplication operation.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="WIDTH">16</parameter>
        <parameter id="WIDTH">16</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="i" width_description="[4:0]">Shift count register.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="done_r">Multiplication completion flag.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="done_r">Multiplication completion flag.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="done_r">Multiplication completion flag.</reg>

samples.tb_log:
[COMPILE verilator+cpp]
%Warning-WIDTH: multi_16bit.v:59:18: Operator ASSIGNDLY expects 32 bits on the Assign RHS, but Assign RHS's CONST '16'h0' generates 16 bits.
                                   : ... In instance multi_16bit
   59 |             areg <= 16'd0;
      |                  ^~
                ... Use "/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Warning-WIDTH: multi_16bit.v:64:22: Operator ASSIGNDLY expects 32 bits on the Assign RHS, but Assign RHS's VARREF 'ain' generates 1 bits.
                                   : ... In instance multi_16bit
   64 |                 areg <= ain;
      |                      ^~
%Warning-WIDTH: multi_16bit.v:65:22: Operator ASSIGNDLY expects 16 bits on the Assign RHS, but Assign RHS's VARREF 'bin' generates 1 bits.
                                   : ... In instance multi_16bit
   65 |                 breg <= bin;
      |                      ^~
%Warning-WIDTH: multi_16bit.v:68:46: Operator SHIFTL expects 32 bits on the LHS, but LHS's VARREF 'breg' generates 16 bits.
                                   : ... In instance multi_16bit
   68 |                     yout_r <= yout_r + (breg << (i-1));
      |                                              ^~
%Warning-WIDTH: multi_16bit.v:74:17: Operator ASSIGNW expects 1 bits on the Assign RHS, but Assign RHS's VARREF 'yout_r' generates 32 bits.
                                   : ... In instance multi_16bit
   74 |     assign yout = yout_r;
      |                 ^
make[1]: Entering directory '/tmp/comba_multi_16bit_b4ls6wjm/obj_dir'
g++  -I.  -MMD -I/usr/share/verilator/include -I/usr/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -Os -c -o tb.o ../tb.cpp

g++  -I.  -MMD -I/usr/share/verilator/include -I/usr/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -Os -c -o verilated_vcd_c.o /usr/share/verilator/include/verilated_vcd_c.cpp
